race.description: STRADBROKE SEASON ON SALE NOW BENCHMARK 68 HCP
race.comment: WILLIE OR WONG HE (12) broke the maiden status in dominant fashion last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the finish. TRUMP CARD (4) has placed two from two over this course and distance and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Has to be included. The penny has dropped for DREAM THINKER (7) who has won three of his past four outings with Cartwright being in the saddle for all three successes. Top-three commodity. ARTFUL GIRL (1) is a three-time winner over this track and trip and gets some weight off with the 1.5kg claim. Watch for sharp improvement. ROCK YA (2) next in line with Rodd on board.
